channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: Social media bans and digital curfews to be trialled on UK teenagers
item.description: [BBC Technology] The government will interview the young people and their parents before and after they try the limits to assess their impact.

item.title: Meta told to pay $375m for misleading users over child safety
item.description: [BBC Technology] The owner of Instagram, Facebook and WhatsApp has been found liable by a court in New Mexico.

item.title: Kentucky woman rejects $26M offer to turn her farm into a data center
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] A "major artificial intelligence company" reportedly offered a Kentucky family $26 million to build a data center on their farm.

item.title: Pentagon’s ‘Attempt to Cripple’ Anthropic Is Troubling, Judge Says
item.description: [WIRED AI] During a hearing Tuesday, a district court judge questioned the Department of Defense’s motivations for labeling the Claude AI developer a supply-chain risk.

item.title: Baltimore sues Elon Musk's xAI over Grok sexual 'deepfakes'
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Meta ordered to pay $375 million in New Mexico trial over child exploitation, user safety claims
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: OpenAI just gave up on Sora and its billion-dollar Disney deal
item.description: [The Verge AI] On Tuesday afternoon, OpenAI announced "We're saying goodbye to Sora," the video generation tool that it launched at the end of 2024, and centered in a massive licensing deal with Disney only a few months ago. The Wall Street Journal reported the move earlier, saying that OpenAI boss Sam Altman had

item.title: Anthropic hands Claude Code more control, but keeps it on a leash
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Anthropic’s new auto mode for Claude Code lets AI execute tasks with fewer approvals, reflecting a broader shift toward more autonomous tools that balance speed with safety through built-in safeguards.

item.title: Spotify tests new tool to stop AI slop from being attributed to real artists
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] The idea behind the new tool is to give artists more control over which tracks are associated with their name on Spotify.

item.title: GameStop posts 14% fall in quarterly revenue amid digital gaming shift
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Arm’s first CPU ever will plug into Meta’s AI data centers later this year
item.description: [The Verge AI] After decades of only licensing its chip designs for others to use, UK-based Arm revealed the first chip it's producing on its own, and the first customer. Dubbed the Arm AGI CPU, it's another chip designed for inference, or running the cloud processing for AI tools like AI agents that can continue

item.title: Databricks bought two startups to underpin its new AI security product
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] With an overflowing war chest from its recent $5 billion raise, Databricks is buying startups and looking for more. It acquired Antimatter and SiftD.ai.

item.title: OpenAI set to discontinue Sora video platform
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Arm is releasing the first in-house chip in its 35-year history
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Arm is producing its own CPU for the first time. It developed the CPU with Meta, which is also the chip's first customer.

item.title: OpenAI’s plans to make ChatGPT more like Amazon aren’t going so well
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] OpenAI says it's moving away from Instant Checkout, which allowed users to buy items directly through the ChatGPT interface.

item.title: Arm unveils new AI chip, expects it to add billions in annual revenue
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Oil, stock trading spiked before Trump's Iran remarks: Media
item.description: [CNA Tech] “What stands out here isn't just the size of the trades, but the timing,” said Stephen Innes, analyst at SPI Asset Management.

item.title: ChatGPT and Gemini are fighting to be the AI bot that sells you stuff
item.description: [The Verge AI] The AI-powered shopping rivalry is heating up as Google and OpenAI launch new features to help you buy things while interacting with their chatbots. Now, Google is teaming up with Gap Inc to allow its Gemini AI assistant to purchase clothes on your behalf from any of its stores, which include Gap, O

item.title: Arm Is Now Making Its Own Chips
item.description: [WIRED AI] The chip design firm says Meta, OpenAI, Cerebras, and Cloudflare are among the first customers of its new artificial intelligence hardware.

item.title: Athena signals Zeta’s push into AI-driven marketing systems
item.description: [MarTech] Zeta is betting that tighter integration of data and AI will reduce the gap between insight and action. The post Athena signals Zeta’s push into AI-driven marketing systems appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Why AI personalization comes with strict limits
item.description: [MarTech] Consumers are more willing to trade data for better recommendations, but they are very clear about what the red lines are. The post Why AI personalization comes with strict limits appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: NTUC working with transport groups to ensure fuel price spikes not passed on to drivers, riders
item.description: [Straits Times] The livelihoods of cabbies, private-hire drivers and delivery riders must stay sustainable, said NTUC's Ms Yeo Wan Ling.

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude Code and Cowork can control your computer
item.description: [The Verge AI] Anthropic has updated Claude to perform tasks in its Code and Cowork AI tools autonomously by using your computer for you. The new feature can be used to automatically open files, use web browsers and apps, and run dev tools "with no setup required," even when you're away from your computer, accordi

item.title: 腾讯挖来多位字节Seed骨干，向姚顺雨汇报丨智能涌现独家
item.description: [36氪] 文｜周鑫雨 编辑｜苏建勋 自2025年9月姚顺雨加入腾讯以来，被视为腾讯重注基础模型的持续信号，事实上，在整个2025年，腾讯都在疯狂向业界招揽大模型基础设施领域人才，当中，出现了多位“字节系”技术骨干的身影。 据接近腾讯混元团队的知情人士透露，原字节Seed视觉AI平台团队负责人肖学锋，Infra团队张弛于近期低调入职腾讯，负责大模型Infra相关工作，向腾讯首席AI科学家姚顺雨汇报。 2025年年底，腾讯升级大模型研发架构，新成立AI Infra部，由姚顺雨担任部门负责人。据了解，肖学锋入职后，直接担任该部门的助理负责人，协助姚顺雨负责该部门管理工作。 同时，该部门内的

item.title: ‘Companies don’t roll their eyes anymore’: SGX equities boss on getting firms to list
item.description: [Straits Times] Sustaining the revival will require rebuilding neglected parts of the market and shifting long-held mindsets, he added.

item.title: Why performance marketing stops working
item.description: [MarTech] Most brands optimize conversion while neglecting demand. Here’s what happens when the pipeline runs dry and how to fix it. The post Why performance marketing stops working appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: 氪星晚报 ｜卢伟冰：今年小米在AI领域的研发和资本投入预计将超160亿；蜜雪集团：2025年营收335.6亿元，同比增长35.2%；汇丰任命首位首席AI官
item.description: [36氪] 大公司： 农夫山泉：2025全年营收525.5亿元，同比增长22.5% 36氪获悉，农夫山泉公告，2025年营收525.5亿元，同比增长22.5%，预估505.3亿元； 全年净利润158.7亿元，同比增长30.9%，预估149.9亿元；每股末期股息0.99元。 卢伟冰：今年小米在AI领域的研发和资本投入预计将超160亿 36氪获悉，3月24日，小米集团合伙人、集团总裁卢伟冰在财报业绩电话会上表示，小米AI大模型已取得快速发展，进步远超预期。全球几乎很难找到第二家公司能同时在人、车、家多个空间落地物理AI，这是小米的独特机会。近期发布的第二代MiMo大模型，已初步完成面向Agen

item.title: Singapore stocks rebound on March 24; STI up 0.4%
item.description: [Straits Times] The STI gained 21.13 points to finish at 4,862.43.

item.title: 阿里即时零售的钱，该交给AI了
item.description: [钛媒体] 即时零售消耗的资源，会挤压到AI的空间。

item.title: 在华强北，AI首先是门生意
item.description: [钛媒体] 华强北宣告进入AI时间。

item.title: 微信的“局部开放”：当超级App遇见开源“龙虾”，谁在制定新规矩？
item.description: [钛媒体] 绝对不让渡哪怕一丁点的流量分发权和规则制定权。

item.title: 比Google的传输协议快10倍，他要给8000亿Agent修高速公路｜AI Founder 请回答
item.description: [钛媒体] 类互联网基础设施对Agent不适用，那就为Agent重建一个多、快、好、省的专用互联网。

item.title: Chris Hayes Has Some Advice for Keeping Up With the News
item.description: [WIRED AI] The host of MS Now’s All In, knows how hard it is to stay current. But he also knows where you should focus your attention—and it starts with a sober view of AI.

item.title: Your Body Is Betraying Your Right to Privacy
item.description: [WIRED AI] Attachment to smart devices and biometric surveillance leaves Americans more vulnerable to police searches than ever. Left unchecked it will only get worse.

item.title: Headstart podcast recap: Playing the infinite game in life; avoid being overinsured
item.description: [Straits Times] Synopsis: Every first and third Monday of the month, get a headstart in your personal finance and career with The Straits Times.

item.title: 油价大涨，对金发科技影响有多大？
item.description: [钛媒体] 扰动在所难免。

item.title: 大疆严防影石
item.description: [钛媒体] 两家深圳硬科技巨头——大疆创新（DJI）与影石创新（Insta360）的竞争从市场端的刺刀见红，正式延烧至法理的存亡之战。

item.title: 黑石加仓，热钱蓄势：2026 年中国商办投资迎来布局窗口期？
item.description: [36氪] 01.遇事不决不动产 投资圈近期最热的话题，莫过于OpenAI、Anthropic即将IPO的消息。 一直以来，位于行业塔尖的企业总有着最高的确定性与最惊人的估值，更何况是风头正盛的人工智能。在最新一轮的融资后，OpenAI的估值已超过50000亿人民币，与门内顿足捶胸的英伟达相比，更苦闷的是门外守着的诸多顶级财团—— 即便不谈全球范围的量化宽松，优质标的也远比寻找机会的热钱稀缺。 近日，全球最大的另类资产管理公司‌黑石集团也发布了2025年业绩。在2025年，黑石在管资产规模同比增长13%，在期末升至史无前例的1.27万亿美元。 作为全球最大的另类资产管理商，黑石集团持着

item.title: Former OCBC chief Helen Wong’s pay falls 6.3% to $12 million in last year at bank
item.description: [Straits Times] She was paid $12.8 million in 2024 and $12.1 million in 2023.

item.title: Sembcorp shortlists banks for $2.7 billion loan to buy Australia’s Alinta Energy: Sources
item.description: [Straits Times] The loan arrangers are ANZ, DBS and OCBC, people familiar with the matter said.

item.title: 珀乐互动完成天使轮融资，以AI+IP重塑数字内容生态 | 36氪首发
item.description: [36氪] 36氪获悉，以AI为核心的数字内容公司珀乐互动科技（下称“珀乐互动”）已完成天使轮融资，金额为数千万元人民币。本轮投资由星连资本领投、春华创投跟投，资金将重点用于技术研发、团队扩充与IP商业化开发，全面加速公司多模态泛娱乐生态的战略布局。 珀乐互动成立于2025年，是一家聚焦于“AI+IP”融合模式的科技公司。其核心业务是通过自研技术中台，将AI大模型能力深度应用于IP的开发、运营与衍生环节，提升全链条效率。 公司核心团队汇集了AI、影视创作、数字内容制作等多领域的人才。创始人杨晟曾参与制作多部影视作品，也曾监制Steam爆款互动影游，具备跨界打造成功产品的经验与商业落地能力。 值

item.title: 36氪首发 | 斯坦福博士做分子检测平台，产品已进入北大、清华
item.description: [36氪] 作者 | 张子怡 编辑 | 袁斯来 硬氪获悉，广州洞察科技有限公司（以下简称“洞察科技”）于近日完成数千万元Pre-A轮融资。本轮融资由联想创投领投，力合金融、哇牛资本跟投，老股东天图资本和雅亿资本持续加注，芯湃资本担任本轮财务顾问。融资资金将用于晶圆级超高密度打孔机、超薄膜材料以及基因测序仪商业机的研发。 固态纳米孔是一种以半导体工艺为基础的单分子传感平台。相比传统方案，该技术结构简洁，无需复杂的扩增与标记步骤，能够直接测量生物大分子的本征物理属性。在基因测序、癌症早筛和单分子分析中潜力巨大。 洞察科技专注于固态纳米孔单分子检测技术的研

item.title: 36氪首发 | 红杉、明势给远距影像硬件公司投资千万美金，创始人为前海康萤石产品负责人
item.description: [36氪] 作者 | 张子怡 编辑 | 袁斯来 硬氪获悉，聚焦远距影像场景的科技创新团队「大览科技」，在一个月内连续完成天使轮及Pre-A轮融资，融资金额达千万美元。 融资由红杉中国、明势创投领投，老股东嘉程资本持续跟投。融资资金将主要用于核心产品研发、供应链和组织建设。当前，「大览」核心产品已进入面向量产的关键推进阶段，并持续引入影像算法、软硬件开发及市场营销等关键人才。 资本押注的背后，是远距影像正在展现出的巨大消费潜力。vivo前不久在2026 年世界移动通信大会(MWC 2026)上亮相的vivo X300 Ultra，其外接的超远摄增距镜曾

item.title: Tencent integrates WeChat with OpenClaw AI agent amid China tech battle
item.description: [Business Times] The software, called ClawBot, will appear as a contact within China’s most popular app

item.title: AI videos of sexualised black women removed from TikTok after BBC investigation
item.description: [BBC Technology] Dozens of Instagram and TikTok accounts have used AI avatars to promote explicit content, the BBC finds.

item.title: Google’s new Pixel 10 ads made me go ‘Wait, WHAT are they trying to sell?’
item.description: [The Verge AI] Ever watch a TV ad and wonder, "How did this get approved?" Today, Google has not one but two new ad spots for its six-month-old Pixel 10 phones, and… let's just say they may not come across as intended. First, there's "With 100x Zoom," an ad that appears to suggest that if a vacation rental [&#8230

item.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says ‘I think we’ve achieved AGI’
item.description: [The Verge AI] On a Monday episode of the Lex Fridman podcast, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang made a hot-button statement: "I think we've achieved AGI." AGI, or artificial general intelligence, is a vaguely defined term that has incited a lot of discussion by tech CEOs, tech workers, and the general public in recent year

item.title: Will AI end SEO?
item.description: [MarTech] From prompt engineering to data quality, SEO still depends on human input — even with AI's expanding capabilities. The post Will AI end SEO? appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: How to prove ROI from AI workflow integration in B2B marketing
item.description: [MarTech] Embedding AI into marketing workflows promises big efficiency and performance gains — but you’ll need the right ROI models to justify the investment. The post How to prove ROI from AI workflow integration in B2B marketing appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Meet the Gods of AI Warfare
item.description: [WIRED AI] In its early days, the AI initiative known as Project Maven had its fair share of skeptics at the Pentagon. Today, many of them are true believers.

item.title: The AI Race Is Pressuring Utilities to Squeeze More From Europe’s Power Grids
item.description: [WIRED AI] As data center developers queue up to connect to power grids across Europe, network operators are experimenting with novel ways of clearing room for them.

item.title: AI commoditizes marketing execution and elevates judgment
item.description: [MarTech] Marketing teams risk flooding channels with low-quality AI slop. Learn how to balance speed with strategy and protect brand integrity. The post AI commoditizes marketing execution and elevates judgment appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Hargreaves Lansdown says IT issues which affected thousands are over
item.description: [BBC Technology] The finance firm has apologised for the disruption to its website and app, which has angered many customers.

item.title: Luke Littler applies to trademark his face to combat AI fakes
item.description: [BBC Technology] The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.

item.title: Publisher cancels horror novel's release over AI claims
item.description: [BBC Technology] Author Mia Ballard denies having used AI herself when writing the horror story Shy Girl.

item.title: Unitree plans 4.2 billion yuan Shanghai IPO, testing interest in humanoid robots
item.description: [Business Times] IPO is one of China’s biggest domestic tech listings in years

item.title: How a Vietnamese beauty startup landed a US$38 million exit
item.description: [Business Times] The Skinetiq deal with Marico marks a rare startup exit in Vietnam
